languages.text: {n}Такой поступок клир {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Адептус Министорум{/g} назвал бы ересью клятвопреступничества, ведь вы отказываетесь продолжать служение Богу-Императору. Впрочем, в этом случае долг не заканчивается даже в смерти.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Такой поступок клир {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Адептус Министорум{/g} назвал бы ересью клятвопреступничества, ведь вы отказываетесь продолжать служение Богу-Императору. Впрочем, в этом случае долг не заканчивается даже в смерти.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Такой поступок клир {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Адептус Министорум{/g} назвал бы ересью клятвопреступничества, ведь вы отказываетесь продолжать служение Богу-Императору. Впрочем, в этом случае долг не заканчивается даже в смерти.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}

{n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}

{n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}国教{/g}的神职人员们会将此等行径视为背弃誓言的异端之举，因为这意味着你拒绝继续为神皇效命。但在此情形下，即便死亡也无法终结你的职责。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}国教{/g}的神职人员们会将此等行径视为背弃誓言的异端之举，因为这意味着你拒绝继续为神皇效命。但在此情形下，即便死亡也无法终结你的职责。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les clercs de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} jugeraient une telle désertion comme une trahison impie de votre serment, car vous refuseriez ce faisant de persévérer au service de l'Empereur-Dieu. Sauf qu'en l'occurrence, la mort elle-même ne saurait vous délivrer des chaînes du devoir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les clercs de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} jugeraient une telle désertion comme une trahison impie de votre serment, car vous refuseriez ce faisant de persévérer au service de l'Empereur-Dieu. Sauf qu'en l'occurrence, la mort elle-même ne saurait vous délivrer des chaînes du devoir.{/n}

languages.text: {n} {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} ruhbanları, Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetinde devam etmeyi reddetmiş olacağından böyle bir eylemi yemin bozma kâfirliği olarak görürdü. Ancak bu durumda vazife, ölümde bile sona ermez.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n} {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} ruhbanları, Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetinde devam etmeyi reddetmiş olacağından böyle bir eylemi yemin bozma kâfirliği olarak görürdü. Ancak bu durumda vazife, ölümde bile sona ermez.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los clérigos del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} considerarían tal acción una herejía perjura, ya que estarías abandonando el servicio del Dios Emperador. Pero, en este caso, el deber no termina ni con la muerte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los clérigos del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} considerarían tal acción una herejía perjura, ya que estarías abandonando el servicio del Dios Emperador. Pero, en este caso, el deber no termina ni con la muerte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Kleriker des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} würden eine solche Tat als Ketzerei des Eidbruchs einstufen, da du dich weigern würdest, dem Gottimperator weiter zu dienen. Aber in diesem Fall endet die Pflicht nicht einmal mit dem Tod.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Kleriker des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} würden eine solche Tat als Ketzerei des Eidbruchs einstufen, da du dich weigern würdest, dem Gottimperator weiter zu dienen. Aber in diesem Fall endet die Pflicht nicht einmal mit dem Tod.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}ミニストラム{/g}の聖職者たちは、そのような行為を誓約違反の異端と見なすだろう。なぜなら、あなたは皇帝神への奉仕を続けることを拒否しているからだ。しかし、この場合、死に至るまで義務は終わらない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}ミニストラム{/g}の聖職者たちは、そのような行為を誓約違反の異端と見なすだろう。なぜなら、あなたは皇帝神への奉仕を続けることを拒否しているからだ。しかし、この場合、死に至るまで義務は終わらない。{/n}
